event.description:
Are you ready to dive into the world of cutting-edge technology, such as generative AI? Join us at the upcoming **[IBM TechXchange Conference 2023 Keynote Sessions](http://ibm.biz/techxchange)**, a captivating series of **no-cost live streams** that will unravel the latest advancements in AI, automation, security, and cloud solutions.

**Keynote Opening General Session: In a world where AI writes code, what is the role of the developer?**

Generative AI is poised to transform enterprises. Its rapid advancement may raise questions about how it will impact various professions, especially that of the developer. Join Dinesh Nirmal, Senior Vice President of Products, IBM Software, for a discussion about what is possible and what is real when it comes to generative AI and its implications for enterprise technologists. He’ll be joined by a series of guests who will together explore key enterprise use cases, demonstrate IBM’s enterprise-ready, AI and data platform with AI Assistants, and showcase the technology’s full potential from the perspective of enterprises that are putting it to work. Learn how generative AI is unlocking new levels of productivity and how it will enable today’s technologists to build the future.

**Speakers**

* Dinesh Nirmal, Senior Vice President of Products, IBM Software
* Anant Jhingran, IBM Fellow & CTO, Software, IBM

**How to Attend**

* All you need to do is just go to the [IBM TechXchange Conference website](https://ibm.biz/BdMaFp) at the scheduled times to view the live keynote sessions!
* The sessions will be live-streamed on the IBM TechXchange Conference website at [https://ibm.biz/BdMaFp](https://ibm.biz/BdMaFp). You can also watch the recordings after the event.

group.name: Data, Cloud and AI in NYC

event.title: IBM TechXchange Conference 2023 Live Stream - Keynote Opening General Session
